product_overview: Lunaire is a premium sleepwear and loungewear boutique that lets shoppers browse curated collections, inspect product details, and complete a streamlined purchase journey. The experience emphasizes brand storytelling, elegant discovery, and a polished cart-to-checkout flow.
core_goals: Browse the boutique catalog and curated collections
Filter and sort products to find preferred items
Review product details, variants, and recommendations before purchase
Add selected items to the cart and manage quantities
Complete billing and shipping checkout for an order
Read brand story content and contact the brand with inquiries

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Move between the main brand, shopping, storytelling, and contact pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the landing page -> Navigate to /shop -> View the product catalog -> Navigate to /collections -> Explore curated collection storytelling -> Navigate to /about -> Read the brand story -> Navigate to /contact -> Open the inquiry page

features.name: Home Discovery
features.description: Explore the brand landing page with featured products, bestsellers, and testimonials.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the hero and featured brand content -> Scroll through the featured sections -> Review bestsellers -> Read customer testimonials

features.name: Shop Browsing and Discovery
features.description: Browse the catalog and narrow choices using collection filters and sorting.
user_flows: Navigate to /shop -> Browse the product catalog -> Select a collection filter -> View the filtered product list -> Choose a sorting option -> See items reordered by the selected criterion
Navigate to /shop -> Browse the product catalog -> Select the Silk Dreams filter -> View only matching products -> Select Price Low to High sorting -> See the catalog reordered by price

features.name: Product Details and Configuration
features.description: Inspect a product, choose variants, and prepare it for purchase.
user_flows: Navigate to /product/midnight-silk-slip -> Review the product gallery and details -> Select a color variant -> Select a size option -> Add the item to the cart -> See the cart updated with the chosen configuration
Navigate to /product/midnight-silk-slip -> Review fabric, care, and fit details -> View related product recommendations

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: Review cart contents, adjust quantities, and proceed to checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> View cart items and subtotal -> Increase an item quantity -> Decrease an item quantity -> Review the updated subtotal -> Proceed to checkout
Navigate to /shop -> Add a selected item to the cart -> Navigate to /cart -> Confirm the selected size and color are tracked in the cart -> Review the live subtotal

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Enter billing and shipping information to place an order.
user_flows: Navigate to /checkout -> Review the order summary -> Enter billing details -> Enter shipping details -> Review estimated totals -> Submit the checkout form and see confirmation

features.name: Contact Inquiry Form
features.description: Send a message or inquiry to the brand through the contact page.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Enter a name -> Enter an email address -> Select an inquiry subject -> Type a message -> Submit the form and see success confirmation

features.name: Collections Storytelling
features.description: Read the curated collections narrative and brand craftsmanship story.
user_flows: Navigate to /collections -> Read the curated collection narrative -> Explore the featured collection themes -> Learn about the brand's aesthetic direction

features.name: About Brand Story
features.description: Learn about the founder, origin, and philosophy behind the brand.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read the origin story -> Learn about the founder -> Review the brand philosophy

routes.description: Brand landing page with bestsellers and testimonials
Boutique product catalog with filtering and sorting
Detailed product page with variant selections and details
Shopping cart drawer and checkout path
Checkout billing and shipping form page
About page detailing origin, founder, and philosophy

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Seamless navigation menu to traverse across application routes
user_interactions: Click Home link to visit landing page
Click Shop link to view boutique catalog
Click Collections link to explore curate stories
Click About link to read brand philosophy
Click Contact link to get in touch

features.name: Cart Context & Management
features.description: Global state context managing items, quantities, and persistent storage
user_interactions: Add items of selected size and color to cart
Increase or decrease item quantities in the cart
View live cart subtotal and product list

features.name: Contact Serene Form
features.description: Submit custom messages or inquiries directly to support
user_interactions: Submit form and see success confirmation

features.name: Shop Filters & Sorting
user_interactions: Click on Silk Dreams or Lace Nights category filter
Select sorting dropdown to sort items by Price Low to High

features.name: Product Selection & Configuration
features.description: Configure color and size selections on the product page
